text.title: dotfiles-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for dotfiles-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using stow --adopt to absorb existing files into the package without reviewing the result.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: --adopt moves the existing file into the stow package, potentially overwriting your dotfiles repo version. Always review git diff after --adopt to confirm the absorbed content is what you want to keep.

failure-mode.description: Using a public GitHub repository for dotfiles without a comprehensive .gitignore.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Public dotfiles repos are indexed by search engines and scraped by secret-scanning tools. A single committed private key or API token is a permanent breach even if deleted later (git history).
